subject: LU-18162 obdclass: remove o_cleanup/setup and friends

Patch Set 1:

This is the ultimate result of this series i.e. dropping o_setup/o_cleanup/etc. Now all devices in Lustre are created and destroyed in more-or-less the same way.

parents.subject: LU-18162 osc: convert Object Storage Client to LU device

commit.subject: LU-18162 obdclass: remove o_cleanup/setup and friends
commit.message:
LU-18162 obdclass: remove o_cleanup/setup and friends

All users for the legacy OBD API have been converted to
the LU device API. Hence, remove:

o_setup
o_cleanup
o_precleanup
o_process_config

Adjust the corresponding obd_* functions to handle this.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: Ieb279378c050b969b95639e3fe8a6d87fb66a1ff
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/58831
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
